Our Promise to You

We Make the Biggest
Decision of Your Life
Simple & Safe

Buying property from abroad is one of life's most exciting moments — and one of its most complex. Too many NRI families have been burned by brokers with hidden agendas, developers with NCLT proceedings, and paperwork nightmares.

We built BuyingEase to fix this. One trusted advisor, complete AI-powered due diligence, and a zero-fraud promise — from your first call to your Grah Pravesh.

  • Complete AI due diligence before you commit a single rupee
  • Luxury escorted site visits — fully managed, completely free
  • Full NRI legal support: FEMA, POA, RERA compliance
  • Senior advisor with you every step — not a junior broker
Real Moments, Real Families

500+ Families Found Their
Dream Home with Us

Sharma Family · Gurugram · November 2025
The Mehtas · Hyderabad · August 2025
Kapoor Family · Dubai · January 2026

The Buying Journey

From First Thought
to Token — in 7 Days

A meticulous, fully-guided process that turns the most complex purchase of your life into a clear, confident decision.

01
Day 1 · Morning
You Contact Us
Reach out via WhatsApp, call, or form. We respond within 2 hours — no scripts, no sales pitch. Just a senior advisor ready to listen.
WhatsApp · Call · Form
02
Day 1 · Afternoon
Deep Discovery Call
Senior advisor calls to deeply understand your goals — ROI, residential needs, budget, family size, lifestyle requirements.
Personalised · In-depth
03
Day 2–3
AI Research & Builder Trust Score
Our AI engine scans RERA records, NCLT filings, and 40+ data points to generate a Builder Trust Score for every shortlisted property.
Proprietary Research Framework
04
Day 3
Curated Shortlist — 3 to 4 Options
We present only 3–4 best-fit options with a detailed BuyingEase Property Health Report for each. Quality over quantity, always.
Detailed Report Included
05
Day 4
AR/VR Property Walkthrough
Experience each property through our AR/VR platform from anywhere in the world — floor plans, views, neighbourhood feel.
Immersive · Remote
06
Day 5
Luxury Property Exploration
Our senior advisor picks you up in our premium vehicle and personally escorts you through each property — with insights no broker can offer.
Luxury Escorted · Free
07
Day 6
Deal Sealed with Token
We handle all negotiations, paperwork, legal review, and documentation — sealing your deal with full transparency and zero surprises.
Fully Managed
08
Ongoing
Till Your Grah Pravesh
We stay connected — tracking construction milestones, legal handover, RERA compliance, and every detail until you walk through your door.
Lifetime Relationship

Our Story

We Believe Every Buyer
Deserves the Full Truth

BuyingEase was born from a simple, painful truth: India's real estate market is full of information asymmetry that consistently harms buyers. We built the system we wished had existed — powered by AI, anchored by integrity, and run by people who have walked the same journey.

Our Mission

Making Property Buying
Transparent & Fast

We started with a simple belief: buying property should not require 6 months of stress, hundreds of broker calls, and blind trust in strangers with unknown agendas.

Today we have helped over 500 NRI families and HNIs buy their dream properties — across Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, and Dubai — with an average closing time of just 7 days and a fraud rate of zero.

Our proprietary research framework, AI compliance engine, and zero-fraud policy are not promises — they are our operating model, verified on every single deal.

Our Values

What We Stand For

01
Radical Transparency
We show you everything — builder scores, NCLT red flags, comparable deals, and our research findings. No softening, no omissions, no hidden agendas.
02
Client First, Always
We have walked away from multi-crore commissions because a property did not meet our standards. Your trust is our only currency.
03
Technology as an Edge
AI compliance, AR/VR tours, and our proprietary research framework give you a decisive advantage in a market full of information asymmetry.
Leadership

The Team Behind
the Promise

Nikhil
Founder & CEO
Former investment banker with 15 years in real estate across India, Singapore, and UAE. Built BuyingEase after his own frustrating NRI buying experience — determined to fix the system from within.
Priya Mehta
Chief Advisory Officer
IIM Ahmedabad alumna with 12 years in luxury real estate advisory across Delhi and Dubai. Personally oversees every client relationship — 200+ deals closed.
Sneha Iyer
Head of Research & AI
IIT Bombay alumna & ex-Strategy consultant. Leads our AI compliance engine and proprietary Builder Trust Score system — the intelligence layer that powers every BuyingEase report.

Partner Benefits

Why Top Agents
Partner With BuyingEase

Qualified, Pre-Screened Leads
Every lead is verified, genuinely interested, and has a clear budget — you spend time closing, not chasing cold contacts.
